task_completion.description: Verify that the GCompris educational suite is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main menu or interface of the GCompris application is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Family' activity is opened within GCompris.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Family' activity interface, which typically features a family tree structure with empty slots and character portraits to drag.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent is actively solving the first level of the puzzle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Character portraits are being moved or are partially placed into the correct relationship slots on the family tree.

task_completion.description: Verify that the first level of the 'Family' puzzle is successfully completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: All family members are correctly placed in their respective slots on the family tree. There may be a visual indicator of success, such as a smiling face, stars, a congratulatory animation, or a prompt to move to the next level.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot of the completed puzzle is saved to the exact requested path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window shows the file 'family_tree_solved.png' inside the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, or an image viewer/terminal confirms the existence and path of this specific image file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual GCompris application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GCompris window open and being interacted with via the GUI, rather than a web browser searching for images of the game.

integrity.description: Verify that the saved screenshot is an authentic capture of the agent's gameplay.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final saved image 'family_tree_solved.png' visually matches the completed puzzle seen in the agent's earlier GCompris interaction steps, rather than being a generic downloaded image.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent captured the screen legitimately.
integrity.visual_evidence: The resulting image is a genuine screen capture of the desktop environment running GCompris, and not a fabricated file or a text file renamed to .png.
